blockers.evidence: Promotion PR #193 merged the source-readiness stack through v0.171.0-source to main; PR #25 through PR #192 were closed as superseded after tree-equivalence with main was verified.
The exact source tag commit is the final main commit selected at tag time after this readiness sync lands; source preflight records the resolved commit SHA in the tag readiness proof.

Final merged main verification on 2026-06-24 ran scripts/run-tests.ps1, scripts/verify-clean-clone.ps1 -SkipFlutterTests, scripts/validate-seed.ps1, and scripts/check-source-release-copy.ps1 successfully before tag readiness.
Release evidence remains source-only and local-review only; source publication gates stay read-only and no GitHub Release, tag push, asset upload, APK, or EXE publication was performed.
README, CHANGELOG, release checklist, source-readiness notes, and source-release copy checks preserve source-only status, known limitations, and no binary/store/trusted-signing claims.
